mapper.select:
SELECT eduExamPaperQuestion.* , eduChapterExamPaper.paper_name AS paperName , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_exam_paper_question eduExamPaperQuestion LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduExamPaperQuestion.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduExamPaperQuestion.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id
ORDER BY eduExamPaperQuestion.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_exam_paper_question eduExamPaperQuestion LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduExamPaperQuestion.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduExamPaperQuestion.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id

SELECT eduExamPaperQuestion.* , eduChapterExamPaper.paper_name AS paperName , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle , eduQuestionBank.question_type AS questionType , eduQuestionBank.difficulty_level AS difficultyLevel FROM edu_exam_paper_question eduExamPaperQuestion LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduExamPaperQuestion.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduExamPaperQuestion.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id
ORDER BY eduQuestionBank.question_type ASC, eduExamPaperQuestion.sort_order ASC, eduExamPaperQuestion.create_time DESC

SELECT eduExamPaperQuestion.* , eduChapterExamPaper.paper_name AS paperName , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_exam_paper_question eduExamPaperQuestion LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduExamPaperQuestion.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduExamPaperQuestion.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id WHERE eduExamPaperQuestion.id = #{id}
